tools.name: check_policy
tools.description: Evaluate tool inputs against AxonFlow governance policies before execution. Returns whether the operation is allowed or blocked, with policy details.

statement.description: The tool input to evaluate (command, query, file content)

tools.name: check_output
tools.description: Scan tool output for PII, secrets, and policy violations. Returns whether output is allowed, with redacted data if PII was found.

connector_type.description: Tool identifier that produced this output

message.description: Text content to scan for PII and secrets

tools.name: audit_tool_call
tools.description: Record a tool execution in AxonFlow's audit trail for compliance evidence.

tools.name: list_policies
tools.description: List active governance policies. Returns policy names, categories, patterns, and severity levels.

tools.name: get_policy_stats
tools.description: Get governance activity summary: total checks, blocks, allows, and top triggered policies.

tools.name: search_audit_events
tools.description: Search individual audit event records. Returns tool call details, policy evaluations, and timestamps for compliance evidence and debugging.

from.description: Start time (ISO 8601). Defaults to last 15 minutes.

request_type.description: Filter by request type (e.g., tool_call_audit, llm_call)

tools.name: explain_decision
tools.description: Explain a previously-made policy decision (ADR-043). Returns matched policies, risk level, reason, override availability, and a rolling 24h hit count. Use this to answer 'why was this blocked?' when a user sees a deny.

decision_id.description: Global decision identifier returned in the original step gate or policy evaluation response.

tools.name: create_override
tools.description: Create a governed session override for a policy that would otherwise deny (ADR-044). Requires a mandatory free-text justification. TTL clamped server-side (default 60m, hard cap 24h, 0 for critical risk). Critical-risk and allow_override=false policies are rejected.

tool_signature.description: Optional: restrict override to a specific tool name.

ttl_seconds.description: Requested TTL in seconds. Clamped server-side (default 3600, min 60, max 86400).

tools.name: delete_override
tools.description: Revoke an active session override (ADR-044). Next policy evaluation after revocation will not consult this override. Emits override_revoked audit event.

tools.name: list_overrides
tools.description: List active session overrides scoped to the caller's tenant (ADR-044). Use to audit or revoke dangling overrides.

include_revoked.description: Include already-revoked overrides in results. Default false.

policy_id.description: Filter to overrides for a specific policy.

tools.name: axonflow_get_tenant_id
tools.description: Return the calling tenant's identity, current tier, and Pro upgrade URL. Use when the user asks how to upgrade, what tier they're on, or for their tenant ID for Stripe Checkout. Available to all tiers.

tools.name: axonflow_request_approval
tools.description: Request human-in-the-loop approval before executing a risky operation (e.g. shell command, file write, git push). On Free tier, 1 approval request allowed per rolling 7-day window. On Pro, unlimited.

original_query.description: The user's original natural-language request that prompted this approval check.

request_type.description: Category of the operation requiring approval (e.g. 'shell_command', 'file_write', 'git_push').

tools.name: axonflow_create_tenant_policy
tools.description: Create a custom tenant-scoped governance policy. Free tier supports 2 active policies (delete one to make room); Pro removes the cap. Useful for rules like 'block writes to ~/.ssh/' or 'require approval for any rm -rf'.

connector_type.description: Tool / connector this policy applies to (e.g. 'claude_code.Bash', '*' for all).

pattern.description: Regex or literal pattern to match against tool inputs.

tools.name: axonflow_list_pro_features
tools.description: Return the locked V1 Plugin Pro feature list as data. Use when the user asks 'what would I get if I upgraded?' Available to all tiers.
